data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version control, specifically tracking which version of the waiver was signed. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to the versioning of the waiver, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The linked use case explicitly states the need for version control, and the absence of this information indicates a gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of version control implementation for the signed waiver.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
